description: Implement agency API providers (ABS, Stats NZ)

archived_review.findings: All track deliverables verified complete. AbsProvider (src/providers/abs.rs) implements DatasetProvider with SDMX-JSON API calls, URL building, ETag/Last-Modified conditional requests, pagination, and comprehensive unit tests. StatsNzProvider (src/providers/stats_nz.rs) implements DatasetProvider with OData v1 API calls, OData JSON value parsing, conditional requests, and unit tests. ProviderRegistry (src/registry.rs) registers both providers with with_defaults() and passes provider lookup tests. Git log shows 7 relevant commits including upgrade-provider-row-parsing, test-provider-304-coverage, and feat: mature open social data pipeline. No live HTTP endpoint checks were performed (marked as non-blocking external follow-up in swarm notes). Track archived clean.
